Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eye of the Deep]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Eye of the Deep is a sapphire that shimmers like sunlight filtered through water and casts blue illumination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Eye of the Deep is an item carried by Renfei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei was gripping the Eye of the Deep in her left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Eye of the Deep can deactivate a portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Eye of the Deep is a jewel with white-and-purple dream madra drifting out of a crack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — The Eye of the Deep is a round, cut gem slightly larger than a fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — The Eye of the Deep contains a damaged internal construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — The Eye of the Deep shows a blue light hovering over an indentation in a stone tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Eye of the Deep is a gem that is leaking essence from a crack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Eye of the Deep is the key to Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon released the Eye of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is in the Eye of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — An Eye of the Deep is a key to the facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — An Eye of the Deep is mentioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony possesses an Eye of the Deep.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon combined Dross with the Eye of the Deep.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
